# Analytical Measurement

**Summary**: An analytical technique to determine concentrations of metal ions in a solution.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014]] used AAS to measure calcium and magnesium concentrations in spent acid samples.
